headline: Axon Vision Retail Case Study Opens New Chapter For Axon Enterprise Investors
summary: Axon Enterprise's Axon Vision platform was featured in a high profile commercial case study highlighting cost savings and revenue uplift for a retail client. The case study, involving The Honey Baked Ham Co., positions Axon Vision as a tool for workflow and customer service improvements beyond public safety use cases. This marks Axon Enterprise's entry into broader commercial and retail markets, expanding its use of connected cameras into business optimization. Axon Enterprise, traded as...
